# ERP Shell Desktop Tauri

Template ID: erp-shell-desktop-tauri
Status: draft
Purpose: Mac and Windows desktop companion for local ERP document intake,
extraction queue review, local runtime status, and sync readiness.
Framework: Tauri + Svelte + Rust
Check: pnpm check:spec
Roadmap: docs/roadmap.md

Use this template when a project needs local files, local model/OCR runtime
control, or batch import into a generated ERP Shell app.

Do not treat it as a standalone offline ERP. The MVP only creates local drafts
and sync status. Approved business records still belong in the Cloudflare ERP
backend.
